ingredients.name: Suehirocho Area Safety Center
ingredients.localName: 万世橋警察署 末広町地域安全センター
ingredients.address: 秋葉原三和東洋ビル, 3 Chome-16-8 Sotokanda, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Located at the Suehirocho end of Akihabara, in the area identified as the fictional site of the Future Gadget Lab. The lab's building is modeled on the narrow multi-story structures north of Horin Park, making this vicinity the heart of Okabe's neighborhood.

ingredients.name: Akihabara Sta. Electric Town Exit West Square
ingredients.localName: 秋葉原駅 電気街口西側広場
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-17-18 Sotokanda, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Electric Town exit plaza is the central hub of the series — the square Okabe crosses daily, where key early scenes unfold and where fans recreate the show's establishing shots of Akihabara.

ingredients.name: Mimatsu tobacco
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-7-3 Kanda Sakumacho, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0025, Japan

ingredients.entityContext: The small park north of Akihabara Station that appears in the series as a quiet corner of the neighborhood near the Future Gadget Lab's fictional location — a common stop on Steins;Gate walking routes.

ingredients.name: Beef Bowl specialty shop Sambo
ingredients.address: Kokusai Buil., 3 Chome-14-4 Sotokanda, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The no-frills gyudon stand that Okabe, Daru, and Suzuha frequent throughout the series — the scene where Suzuha tastes beef bowl for the first time is one of the show's warmest moments. Confirmed Steins;Gate location with its distinctive 'no phones, no questions' house rules.

ingredients.name: Shoheibashikado Bridge
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-12 Kanda Awajicho, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0063, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: A bridge on the Kanda River near Akihabara that appears in the anime as part of the district's streetscape — part of the same riverside corridor as Mansei Bridge and visible in background shots.

ingredients.name: Akihabara Radio Kaikan
ingredients.type: ショッピング モール
categories: ショッピング モール
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-15-16 Sotokanda, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The real-world building whose rooftop the satellite crashes into at the start of the series — and the exact spot where Okabe first discovers Makise Kurisu's body before the time leap resets everything. The single most iconic Steins;Gate pilgrimage site in Akihabara.
